title: teucrium subspinosum subsp. spinescens
intro: Teucrium subspinosum subsp. spinescens, also known as Spiny Woodland Germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium subspinosum plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Teucrium subspinosum subsp. spinescens include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and harnessed for various health benefits.
